*CHEVRON WOULD NOT PAY IRAN TOLL FOR STRAIT OF HORMUZ, CEO SAYS

*CHEVRON HAS SIX SHIPS IN STRAIT OF HORMUZ CURRENTLY, CEO SAYS

*CHEVRON SEES MORE PIPELINES BUILT TO BYPASS STRAIT OF HORMUZ
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Most attempts to assert taxing powers or sovereignty over space itself remain theoretical. As corporate profits from space balloon, that may change. Register for free to read why tax authorities have two options for how to respond  https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/05/28/how-to-tax-businesses-in-orbit-and-beyond?taid=6a197b1986566d0001e06d44&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: …and especially my wife who travelled with me multiple times to Mongolia and put up with all the crazy drama along the way😘
posts.author: hkuppy
